name: Tomato-Olive Conditi
recipeIngredient: 12 Medium Tomatoes, Peeled, Seeded And Chopped
1 13 Ounce Can Tuna In Oil, Well Drained
1 1/4 Cups Black Olives, Pitted And Halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy stainless steel skillet, simmer tomatoes, olive oil, garlic, and basil until the mixture thickens.
2. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Transfer the mixture to a pie plate; cover with foil.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Allow to cool to room temperature, then chill.
8. Serve cold with crackers or Italian bread.
